section.div: I stopped letting AI invent my architecture. I built an open-source AI Agent Instruction Library that forces Cursor, Copilot, Claude & ChatGPT to follow one consistent production-ready structure across FastAPI, Django, ASP.NET Core, Spring Boot, Next.js, React, Angular, Flutter & PostgreSQL.

footer.span: These metrics do not include all private contributions
